     The Numbers Business Report

Anora (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,474,298Details
International Box Office $37,745,198
Worldwide Box Office $58,219,496
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Anora, a young street girl from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella fairytale when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. As soon as the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened, as her parents head to New York to have the marriage annulled.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$550,503 (2.7% of total gross)
Legs:8.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:6 opening theaters/1,938 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,287,337

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 18th, 2024 (Limited) by Neon
November 8th, 2024 (Expands Wide) by Neon
International Releases: October 17th, 2024 (Limited), released as Anora (Анора) (Russia (CIS))
October 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Greece)
October 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Norway)
October 30th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland)
October 30th, 2024 (Limited) (France)
Video Release: December 17th, 2024 by Neon
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content throughout, graphic nudity, pervasive language, and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2846 (cert #55117), 8/7/2024)
Running Time: 139 minutes
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Critics’ Choice Winner Best Picture, Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Oscars Best Picture Winner, Producers Guild of America Best Theatrical Motion Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Film festival: Cannes Film Festival 2024, Toronto International Film Festival 2024
Filming location (city or town): Brooklyn, New York, NY, Las Vegas, NV, New York, NY
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Nevada, United States, New York, United States
Geographical setting: New York City
Plot point: Cross-Class Romance, Dysfunctional Family, Prostitution, Romance
Release detail: Festival Acquisition
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: FilmNation Entertainment, Neon Films, Cre Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Anora, a young street girl from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella fairytale when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. As soon as the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened, as her parents head to New York to have the marriage annulled.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$550,503 (2.7% of total gross)
Legs:8.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:6 opening theaters/1,938 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,287,337

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 18th, 2024 (Limited) by Neon
November 8th, 2024 (Expands Wide) by Neon
International Releases: October 17th, 2024 (Limited), released as Anora (Анора) (Russia (CIS))
October 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Greece)
October 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Norway)
October 30th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland)
October 30th, 2024 (Limited) (France)
Video Release: December 17th, 2024 by Neon
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content throughout, graphic nudity, pervasive language, and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2846 (cert #55117), 8/7/2024)
Running Time: 139 minutes
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Critics’ Choice Winner Best Picture, Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Oscars Best Picture Winner, Producers Guild of America Best Theatrical Motion Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Film festival: Cannes Film Festival 2024, Toronto International Film Festival 2024
Filming location (city or town): Brooklyn, New York, NY, Las Vegas, NV, New York, NY
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Nevada, United States, New York, United States
Geographical setting: New York City
Plot point: Cross-Class Romance, Dysfunctional Family, Prostitution, Romance
Release detail: Festival Acquisition
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: FilmNation Entertainment, Neon Films, Cre Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
